byzantine.reason: DBBE/Byzantine source is locked or training-seen

diplomatic.reason: PapyGreek diplomatic/original source is locked or training-seen

nt_koine.reason: New Testament/Koine source is locked or training-seen

tragedy.reason: no eligible document-disjoint tragedy/poetry development source

document_sets.derivation: fold document = contributed >=1 ok & non-leaked sentence and has no Pedalion training work identity (re-run of build_papygreek_fold selection); dev = nonfold, non-training docs

papygreek_training_work_audit.license: CC BY-SA 4.0 (PapyGreek Treebanks, Vierros et al.)
papygreek_training_work_audit.purpose: documentary-Koine (PapyGreek) DEV fold; experiment/lever-ranking only, document-disjoint from the pinned papygreek-fold test set; never a published number, never fitted against the test fold
papygreek_training_work_audit.reattachment_rule: parse track: the single artificial (elliptic) node's surface children re-attach to the artificial node's own head; the node is dropped; convert_tree normalizes to a single root
